SEARCH

Uses of Class
neqsim.process.automation.AgenticProcessOptimizer

Packages that use AgenticProcessOptimizer
Package
Description
neqsim.process.automation
Stable automation API for programmatic interaction with running NeqSim process simulations.

  • Uses of AgenticProcessOptimizer in neqsim.process.automation

    Methods in neqsim.process.automation that return AgenticProcessOptimizer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.addConstraint(String address, AgenticProcessOptimizer.ConstraintType type, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
    Adds a hard inequality constraint folded into the score as a quadratic penalty.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.addConstraintGreaterOrEqual(String address, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
    Adds a value >= limit hard constraint folded into the score as a quadratic penalty.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.addConstraintLessOrEqual(String address, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
    Adds a value <= limit hard constraint folded into the score as a quadratic penalty.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.addVariable(String address, double lowerBound, double upperBound, String unit)
    Adds a bounded decision variable (degree of freedom).
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.addWatch(String address, String unit)
    Registers an additional address to read every trial and expose to a custom objective function.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.maximize(String address, String unit)
    Sets an address-based objective to maximize.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.minimize(String address, String unit)
    Sets an address-based objective to minimize.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    ProcessAutomation.newOptimizer()
    Creates a new AgenticProcessOptimizer bound to this automation facade.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.setConvergenceTolerance(double convergenceTolerance)
    Sets the relative simplex-size tolerance used to declare convergence of the outer search.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.setInnerConvergence(int innerMaxIterations, double innerTolerance)
    Sets the inner convergence settings passed to every evaluate() call.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.setMaxEvaluations(int maxEvaluations)
    Sets the approximate maximum number of evaluate() calls (objective evaluations).
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.setObjective(String address, AgenticProcessOptimizer.Sense sense, String unit)
    Sets an address-based objective with an explicit sense.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.setObjectiveFunction(Function<Map<String,Double>,Double> objectiveFunction)
    Sets a custom objective function (ML reward shaping).
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.setSeed(long seed)
    Sets the seed for the deterministic random number generator used to seed the simplex.
